# China

**Summary**: A country in East Asia containing the Daqing field.

---

## How It Appears in the Thesis Collection

- [[2023-alameer|Alameer, 2023]] used data from the Daqing field to model highly favorable conditions.

## Geological and Structural Setting

- [[2023-alameer|Alameer, 2023]] Songliao sandstone

## Formations Present

- [[2023-alameer|Alameer, 2023]] Songliao formation

## Key Findings From This Location

- The Daqing field had a viscosity ratio of 30 and produced 2,557,628 BBL. ([[2023-alameer|Alameer, 2023, p. 73]])
